# Neutral Brief — Candidate

De-identified statement of the idea for the founder-blind pressure-test panel. Mechanical
de-identification only — ignore any residual identity cues.

## Problem

- **Who:** Small brokerages with two to ten licensed representatives.
- **How often:** Reconciliation is performed at every month-end close, twelve times a year.
- **How severe:** Two to eight hours of manual spreadsheet work per close, with error risk.
- **Status quo:** Reconciliation is done by hand in Excel, with no dedicated tooling.

## Idea thesis

- **Value:** A focused tool removes the recurring month-end reconciliation burden.
- **Growth:** Adoption spreads through the licensed-representative referral network.
